summary: Fix 1: Persist worker registry to SQLite (pipeline-workers.db sibling to pipeline-jobs.db) — workers reload on startup via ping, no 60s blind window. Fix 2: Re-probe OCR engines in worker-agent.py after 15s on slow-venv machines — easyocr confirmed flipping true on Jafar without manual restart. Jafar deployed and verified. tower-nas unreachable (SSH timeout); run deploy commands when it comes back online.
